message:
fix: Return error for module functions with wrong arg count

Change silent returns to proper error returns across all codegen modules
for functions that require specific argument counts. This ensures invalid
calls fail at compile time rather than silently doing nothing.

Modules fixed:
- os.zig: truncate, kill, system, dup2, read, write, open, urandom, walk,
  symlink, readlink, islink, path_exists/isdir/isfile/abspath/split/splitext/getsize
- itertools_mod.zig: repeat
- textwrap_mod.zig: wrap, fill
- functools_mod.zig: cached_property
- methods/file.zig: writelines, seek
- time_mod.zig: sleep
- random_mod.zig: randrange, choices
- struct_mod.zig: unpack, unpack_from
- pickle_mod.zig: dumps, dump
- hashlib_mod.zig: new
- pathlib.zig: methodWithArg, write, rename, replace, chmod
- gzip_mod.zig: open
- mod_helper.zig: logLevel, b64enc, b64dec, stub, compareDigest
- collections_mod.zig: Counter.subtract
